coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Too easy? Good. 0% into ride. Your ego wants intensity. Your body needs this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 70% for 23:06. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% into session. Endurance work is never wasted. Every minute builds your foundation.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 70% for 23:06. So easy you could do this all day. (Please don't.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First interval at 112%. Set the tone. Your body remembers the last time you quit early.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First interval: 11:54 at 112-112% FTP. Seated. Focus on pacing, not heroics.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: After this recovery, you have 11min at 55%. One interval at a time. Focus here first.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/2. Your legs feel good. Enjoy it. By rep 3 they'll be filing a formal complaint.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First interval: 11:54 at 112-112%. Settle in, don't overcook it.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 55% for 11:54. Then 23min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 55% × 11:54. Then 23min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 11:54 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 55% for 11:54. Then 23min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 55% × 11:54. Seated, 85-100 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 67% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 67% complete. Rep 1/1. 50% at 85-100 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 46 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 46 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/1. 50% FTP × 23:06. Seated. Stay smooth. Breathe deep.
